metadata.name: Add Checked Baggage to Flight Booking

description: A customer who already has a flight booking needs to add one piece of checked luggage.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the cost for one piece of checked baggage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct fee for the luggage.

nodes.task_description: Add the baggage to the booking and process the payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the service and updates the booking.
